title: BountyPledge
description: A pledge-based bounty system that uses items rather than an economy plugin. It is designed for competitive SMPs and player interaction.
body:
# Pledge Bounty
*A pledge-based bounty system for Minecraft servers designed for competitive or SMP environments. Players can place bounties on others, add to existing bounties, track kill results, and independently mark rewards as resolved. The system does **not** guarantee payouts, scams and unreliable clients are part of the intended gameplay.*

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ARsRGvKRmW4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features

### Command: `/bounty`

Opens a GUI with two options:

* **View Bounties**
  Browse active bounties, see which targets are still alive, and view who completed kills.
* **Set / Add Bounty**
  Create new bounties or add rewards to ongoing ones.

### Creating and Managing Bounties

* Players can set a bounty on any target.
* Rewards can be added to an existing bounty at any time.
* A bounty shows all contributors and their pledged items or currency.
* Multiple players can fund the same bounty.

### Viewing Bounties

* Shows all active bounties.
* Displays whether the target has been killed.
* Clicking a bounty reveals all contributors and their pledged rewards.

### Resolution System

Rewards do **not** resolve automatically. Both parties must confirm it as resolved.

* Only when all rewards have been resolved does the bounty disappear.

## Installation

1. Download the latest release.
2. Place the plugin JAR in your server’s `plugins` folder.
3. Restart the server.

## Planned Features
* Admin Management Menu
* Force Resolve Rewards for Admins

## Contributing
* Pull requests are welcome. For major changes, please open an issue first to discuss what you would like to change.
* For bug reporting, please report it in my discord: https://discord.gg/aEGxqg8VbZ
* Feel free to also put suggestions in the discord as well
